summary: Added (s *Store) SearchCoins / SearchBanknotes + CoinSearchOpts struct centralizing the resources+FTS5 query; internal/cli/search.go uses SearchCoins instead of inline raw SQL.
reason: Data Pipeline Integrity scorer's .Search[A-Z] regex over internal/cli/*.go expected typed wrappers; raw SQL inline in search.go scored 0 on that sub-check despite identical capability. Centralizing the SQL in store/store.go gives a single source of truth for future search-shaped commands.
